children.description: Scrollable content. New items appended at the end trigger auto-scroll when pinned

threshold.description: Distance in px from the bottom within which the view is considered pinned

initialPinned.description: Start scrolled to the bottom and pinned on mount

behavior.description: Scroll behavior for the jump button; auto-falls back under prefers-reduced-motion

showJumpButton.description: Show a 'jump to latest' button while the user is scrolled up

jumpButtonLabel.description: Optional visible text on the jump button (icon-only when omitted)

maxHeight.description: Max height of the scroll viewport (number is px)

height.description: Fixed height of the scroll viewport (number is px)

onPinnedChange.description: Fires when the pinned-to-bottom state changes

className.description: Additional CSS classes on the outer wrapper

contentClassName.description: Additional CSS classes on the inner content element

id.description: HTML id attribute on the scroll viewport

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the scroll viewport

role.description: ARIA role for the scroll viewport (e.g. 'log' for live activity feeds)
